title: Bump to v2.0.0-rc.20 — Cite policy + CHANGELOG entry
description: Version bump across all monorepo packages from v2.0.0-rc.19 to v2.0.0-rc.20 (or rc.19+ → rc.20). Append CHANGELOG.md entry summarizing rc.20: (1) cite policy added to canonical bootstrap (TASK-01); (2) two new event variants for cite observation (TASK-02); (3) fabric-hint captures KB: cite line per turn (TASK-03); (4) cite_policy_activated marker emit (TASK-04); (5) fab doctor --cite-coverage CLI surface (TASK-05); (6) coverage algorithm with relevance_paths denominator (TASK-06); (7) bilingual report formatter (TASK-07); (8-9) comprehensive tests; (10) self-host refresh. Acknowledge Cursor cite-coverage deferred to rc.21 (PreToolUse can't see assistant text — needs separate hook surface investigation).

files.change: Bump to '2.0.0-rc.20' if part of monorepo version sync; skip if extension has independent versioning.

files.target: top of file (under Unreleased or before rc.19 section)
files.change: Append rc.20 entry following existing changelog style. Sections: Added (Cite policy section in canonical, `fab doctor --cite-coverage` with --since/--client flags, assistant_turn_observed + cite_policy_activated event variants, bilingual cite-coverage report); Changed (BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL +cite-policy H2; fabric-hint.cjs now captures assistant KB: first-line per turn); Deferred (Cursor cite capture pushed to rc.21 — PreToolUse hook cannot see assistant reply text); Internal (server runDoctorCiteCoverage export; minimatch-based denominator algorithm; performance: <100ms for 10k-event ledgers).

files.path: packages/cli/src/version.ts (or wherever the in-source policy version constant lives — see TASK-04)
files.change: Update getPolicyVersion() return value from TASK-04 stub to '2.0.0-rc.20' if hardcoded; OR confirm runtime version-read mechanism picks up bumped package.json version automatically.

implementation: Confirm current monorepo version (`grep version packages/*/package.json | head -5`).
Bump each package.json version field to '2.0.0-rc.20' (preserve any pnpm workspace internal-dependency version refs).
Update getPolicyVersion() / version constant if hardcoded per TASK-04 decision.
Write CHANGELOG.md rc.20 entry — concise (≤200 words) per existing rc.* style (recent commits bfecffa / chore(rc16) show the format).
Run `pnpm install` to refresh lockfile if internal version refs changed.
Run `pnpm -r build` to confirm everything still compiles at the new version.
Run `pnpm -r test` to confirm full test suite green across all packages.
Commit with msg `chore(rc20): bump to v2.0.0-rc.20 — Cite policy`.

reference.examples: Recent commits bfecffa (chore(rc16): bump to v2.0.0-rc.16 — Config + i18n closure) shows the exact format.

rationale.chosen_approach: Synchronous version bump across all monorepo packages (matches existing rc.X cadence). Single CHANGELOG entry covering the full RC scope.
alternatives_considered: Independent package versioning (rejected: monorepo currently locks all to same RC version)
Skip CHANGELOG and rely on git log (rejected: rc.16 / rc.17 / rc.19 all wrote CHANGELOG entries — convention is established)
decision_factors: Single source of truth for release notes
rationale.tradeoffs: Every RC bumps every package even if some packages unchanged — minor overhead, but matches existing project pattern.

manual_checks: CHANGELOG renders correctly in markdown preview
`fab doctor --cite-coverage` references policy_version 'rc.20' in cite_policy_activated event payload
success_metrics: CHANGELOG.md has new rc.20 section at top
Full test suite passes at new version
policy_version field in cite_policy_activated event reflects rc.20

criteria: CHANGELOG.md has new rc.20 entry summarizing all 10 prior tasks + acknowledging Cursor deferral
policy_version in TASK-04 marker emission returns 'rc.20' (or equivalent)
`pnpm install` lockfile updates cleanly (no version conflicts)
`pnpm -r test` exits 0 with all tests green
Commit msg: `chore(rc20): bump to v2.0.0-rc.20 — Cite policy`
